option_selected: esc-001.proposed_resolution.options[0] (Sev 0 zip production from existing .sdPlugin directory)
rationale: Arbiter routed Sev 1 local fix back to Coordinator (state/escalations/routed/esc-001-routing.json). The .sdPlugin directory was already on disk from Integrator output, so the smallest-scope remedy was to zip it in place with the directory preserved at the zip root, satisfying S4.A4 verbatim. No section outputs modified, no decisions amended, no final/ contents altered.
